University values - University of Oulu
Sustainable development and responsibility at the University of Oulu - University of Oulu
Life in Oulu The Oulu region is home to over 200 000 people, making it the largest urban centre in northern Scandinavia and one of the fastest growing regions in Finland. - University of Oulu

Admissions Around 4,000 new students start their studies with us every year. They study at the bachelor's, master's or doctoral level to pursue a degree or for an exchange period. Would you like to be one of them? - University of Oulu
Top research – At the international forefront of science - University of Oulu
Faculties and units – The research units in our eight faculties constitute a strong multidisciplinary scientific community - University of Oulu

High-level, impactful science The University of Oulu is an internationally-recognised university. We generate new scientific knowledge and solutions to create a more sustainable, intelligent and humane world. - University of Oulu
